word: G1852 - ἐξυπνίζω - exypnízō - ex-oop-nid'-zo - Awake out of sleep

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐξυπνίζω

- Transliteration: Exupnizo

- Phonetic: ex-oop-nid'-zo

- Definition:

1. to wake up, awaken out of a sleep

- Origin: from G1853

- TDNT entry: 17:05,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1853; to waken: - awake out of sleep.
